title: Antares Legal advises Wingreens Farms on ₹120 crore Series D fundraise, acquisition of Safe Harvest
description: Wingreens Farms has raised ₹120 crore from a Series D fundraise led by Ashish Kacholia, with participation from Alchemy Fund. The Company has concurrently acquired 100% shareholding in Safe Harvest through a share swap transaction.Antares Legal advised Wingreens Farms on both the fundraise and the acquisition.The transaction teams were led by Siddharth Bhavnani (Partner).Surbhi Kothiala (Partner), with Associates Divyanshu Bansal, Garima Thukral, Priyanshi Aggarwal and Yashraj Chauhan advised Wi
